meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: User Onboarding for Freelancers: Mastering SaaS Onboarding
content.seo_description: Master user onboarding to overcome SaaS knowledge gaps. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional, high-converting flows for your clients today.
content.answer_block: User onboarding is the bridge between a visitor and a loyal client. By automating the first-run experience, you eliminate the 'no SaaS knowledge' hurdle. Use Antigravity to scaffold the UI and Claude Code to implement logic, ensuring your clients receive a polished, production-ready product in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
You’ve landed the client, but the screen is blank. They have the vision, but they lack the technical foundation to understand how a SaaS should actually feel. You're trapped in the 'no SaaS knowledge' loop, where every feature request becomes a friction point because the user doesn't know where to start.

It’s time to stop building features and start building experiences. By mastering user onboarding, you transform a complex, intimidating platform into a guided journey. This isn't just about tooltips; it's about architecture that converts. We’re going to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to turn your technical debt into a high-converting onboarding engine.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the three 'Aha!' moments your user needs to hit. This prevents feature creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a 3-step onboarding flow including user progress tracking and state management for a SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding state machine logic based on schema'

steps.title: Build the Interactive Overlay
steps.description: Create a non-intrusive UI overlay that highlights core features without blocking the entire workspace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for a step-by-step onboarding coachmark system using Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'import onboarding component and hook into main dashboard'

steps.title: Implement Progress Persistence
steps.description: Ensure users can resume onboarding if they refresh the page by syncing their progress to the backend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a backend service endpoint to store and retrieve current onboarding step index per user ID.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'integrate onboarding persistence into existing auth middleware'

steps.title: Trigger Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Trigger tooltips based on specific user actions rather than a generic linear walkthrough.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a trigger system that launches specific tooltips when a user clicks a button for the first time.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add event listeners to dashboard buttons for contextual onboarding triggers'

steps.title: Analytics and Completion Loop
steps.description: Track drop-off rates at each step to refine the flow and improve conversion metrics for your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an analytics hook that logs onboarding completion data to a standard database table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'analytics tracking for onboarding funnel steps'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Skip Onboarding' button; users hate feeling trapped in a tutorial they didn't ask for.
Use 'Empty States' as onboarding opportunities—don't just show a blank screen, show a 'Create your first project' button.
Keep your onboarding logic decoupled from your main business logic to prevent spaghetti code.
Focus on one single 'Aha!' moment per step, not every feature in the app.
A/B test your onboarding copy; small changes in verbiage can increase completion rates by 20% or more.
resources: User Onboarding UX Best Practices: https://www.nngroup.com
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, implement a feedback survey at the end of the final step to gather qualitative data for your next development sprint.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with client confusion and start shipping high-converting SaaS experiences that sell themselves. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
